description: Attention weights and DAG (phi) structure learned by the model

SingleCausalForecaster.dec_cross: Cross-attention: S → X (source variables influence intermediate variables)
SingleCausalForecaster.dec_self: Self-attention: X → X (intermediate variables influence each other)

StageCausalForecaster.dec1_cross: Stage 1 Cross-attention: S → X (source to intermediate)
StageCausalForecaster.dec1_self: Stage 1 Self-attention: X → X (intermediate to intermediate)
StageCausalForecaster.dec2_cross: Stage 2 Cross-attention: X → Y (intermediate to output)
StageCausalForecaster.dec2_self: Stage 2 Self-attention: Y → Y (output to output)

phi_tensors.description: Learned DAG edge probabilities (sigmoid(phi)). Values in [0,1] where 1 = edge present.
phi_tensors.interpretation: phi is learned by LieAttention and CausalCrossAttention modules

dag_metrics.soft_hamming: Mean absolute difference between learned and true DAG. 0 = perfect, 1 = inverted
dag_metrics.source: 'phi' if LieAttention/CausalCrossAttention used, else 'attention' (mean attention scores)

matrix_indexing.rows: Target variables (queries) - the variables being predicted
matrix_indexing.columns: Source variables (keys) - the variables providing information
matrix_indexing.value_ij: Attention weight from source j to target i (how much target i attends to source j)

variable_mapping.note: No variable mapping defined for dataset 'scm6_mask_test'. Add to DATASET_VARIABLE_MAPPINGS.
